body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The local-openai prompt-trigger line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-038](task-0105): Provider Connection Pooling

## Purpose

Implement provider connection pooling.

## Scope

- Pool design
- Allocation
- Recycling

## Implementation

1. Design pool
2. Implement allocation
3. Add recycling

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Pool designed
2. Allocation works
3. Recycling works
